sys_script.name: Resassign Care Team

sys_update_version.name: sys_script_2f91fd4cc333b6501bf5fe1d0501310f
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_script"><sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><abort_action>false</abort_action><access>package_private</access><action_delete>false</action_delete><action_insert>false</action_insert><action_query>false</action_query><action_update>true</action_update><active>true</active><add_message>false</add_message><advanced>true</advanced><change_fields>false</change_fields><client_callable>false</client_callable><collection>x_1954503_smartc_0_patient</collection><condition/><description/><execute_function>false</execute_function><filter_condition table="x_1954503_smartc_0_patient">medical_departmentVALCHANGES^EQ<item endquery="false" field="medical_department" goto="false" newquery="false" operator="VALCHANGES" or="false" value=""/><item endquery="true" field="" goto="false" newquery="false" operator="=" or="false" value=""/></filter_condition><is_rest>false</is_rest><message/><name>Resassign Care Team</name><order>100</order><priority>100</priority><rest_method/><rest_method_text/><rest_service/><rest_service_text/><rest_variables/><role_conditions/><script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous) {

    // Only run if department actually changed
    if (current.medical_department == previous.medical_department) {
        return;
    }

    // Clear previous assignments
    current.assigned_doctor = '';
    current.u_assigned_nurse = '';

})(current, previous);]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>godwin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-03-18 11:14:30</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>2f91fd4cc333b6501bf5fe1d0501310f</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Resassign Care Team</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="SmartCare Health Managment System" source="x_1954503_smartc_0">bddbbacec3abb6101bf5fe1d050131c9</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="SmartCare Health Managment System">bddbbacec3abb6101bf5fe1d050131c9</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_2f91fd4cc333b6501bf5fe1d0501310f</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>godwin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-03-18 11:14:30</sys_updated_on><template/><when>before</when></sys_script><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=2f91fd4cc333b6501bf5fe1d0501310f"/></record_update>
